zh.Diss or Dysse, Norfolk, Eng: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可迪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Sherman於1422年出生在英國素福爾可亞可利時，他的父親Reverend John Sherman Sr.26歲，母親Mary Lance29歲。他於1444年與Agnes Spurway在英國英格蘭素福爾可亞可利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年4月4日在英國諾福爾可迪斯享年71歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可亞可利。

zh-hans.Diss or Dysse, Norfolk, Eng: 英国英格兰諾福爾可迪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Sherman于1422年出生在英国素福爾可亞可利时，他的父亲Reverend John Sherman Sr.26岁，母亲Mary Lance29岁。他于1444年与Agnes Spurway在英国英格兰素福爾可亞可利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年4月4日在英国諾福爾可迪斯享年71岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可亞可利。

nameMeanings.name: Sherman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): occupational name denoting someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherman, shirman, sharman ‘shearman’.
Americanized form of North German Schürmann (see Schuermann ) and of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schermann .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, from Yiddish sher ‘scissors’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Schuermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Guenter, Hans, Heiner, Klaus, Kurt, Udo.

North German (Schürmann): habitational name for someone from a place called Schüre(n), or a topographic name for someone who lived by a barn, from Middle Low German schüre ‘barn’. Compare Schurmann , Sherman , and Shurman .

variants.name: Shearer
meanings: Scottish and English: occupational name for a reaper of standing crops, a sheep shearer, or someone who used shears to trim the surface of finished cloth and remove excessive nap, from Middle English sherer(e) ‘shearer’, an agent derivative of Middle English schere(n) ‘to shear’. Middle English schere denoted shears and scissors of all sizes. Compare Sherman .
Americanized form of German or Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Scherer   or   Scherrer  , cognates of 1 above. Compare   Sharrer  .

variants.name: Shearman
meanings: English: variant of   Sherman  . The surname is also established in Ireland (Kilkenny).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Sherman was born in 1422, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, his father, Reverend John Sherman Sr., was 26 and his mother, Mary Lance, was 29. He married Agnes Spurway in 1444, in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 April 1493, in Diss, Norfolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Sherman est né en 1422, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Reverend John Sherman Sr., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Lance, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Spurway en 1444, à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1493, à Diss, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Yaxley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Sherman 1422 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reverend John Sherman Sr. 26 und seine Mutter Mary Lance 29. Er hat 1444 in Yaxley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes Spurway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. April 1493 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Diss, Norfolk, England und wurde in Yaxley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sherman è nato il nel 1422 nel Yaxley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Reverend John Sherman Sr., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mary Lance, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Spurway nel 1444, nel Yaxley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 aprile 1493, nel Diss, Norfolk, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Yaxley, Suffolk, England.

ja.Diss or Dysse, Norfolk, Eng: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクディス
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Shermanが1422年にイギリススフォルクヤクスリーで生まれた時，父Reverend John Sherman Sr.は26歳，母Mary Lanceは29歳であった。1444年にイギリスイギリススフォルクヤクスリーでAgnes Spurwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年4月4日にイギリスノーフォルクディスで71歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクヤクスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Sherman(이)가 1422년 영국 수폴크 야스리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reverend John Sherman Sr.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Lance(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 야스리에서 Agnes Spurway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 4월 4일 영국 노르폴크 디스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 야스리에 묻혔다.

mn.Diss or Dysse, Norfolk, Eng: Diss, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Sherman nasceu em 1422, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend John Sherman Sr., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Lance, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Spurway em 1444, em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1493, em Diss, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Sherman родился в 1422 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Reverend John Sherman Sr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Lance, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Spurway в 1444 г. в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 апреля 1493 г. в местности дисс, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности яксли, суффолк, Англия.

sm.Bet. 1483–1541: mai le 1483 e o'o I le 1541

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Sherman nació en 1422, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Reverend John Sherman Sr., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Lance, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnes Spurway en 1444, en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de abril de 1493, en Diss, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Yaxley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
